programme.title: Modern Family: Kids These Days
programme.desc: Haley needs a little motherly advice from Claire as she considers her future with Dylan and her career. Meanwhile, Jay and Cam’s less than politically correct coaching style earns them a class on sensitivity.

programme.title: Modern Family: Putting Down Roots
programme.desc: Dede's husband, Jerry, comes to town to bequeath her possessions to the family. Mitch and Claire receive a little more of Dede than they really know what to do with, Jay and Gloria feel sorry for Jerry and invite him to stay with them while he is in town.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Moving Day
programme.desc: Claire and Phil aren't convinced that Haley and Dylan can make it on their own as they move them into their new apartment before the baby arrives. Meanwhile, Pameron gets out of prison early and has a bone to pick with Mitchell.

programme.title: Modern Family: Blasts From the Past
programme.desc: Phil and Claire decide to take a cycling tour through Italy before they become grandparents, and Dylan introduces them to his mom who has an interesting past.

programme.title: Modern Family: Whanex?
programme.desc: While preparing a presentation for his students about their future goals, Cam must also contend with a bully at the school and Jay is having a little technical trouble during his video conference.

programme.title: Modern Family: We Need to Talk About Lily
programme.desc: Phil may have conquered his biggest real estate challenge when he thinks he found Pepper his dream home. Meanwhile, in an attempt to connect with Lily, Mitch and Cam get invited to an exclusive event for her favourite vlogger.

programme.title: Modern Family: Snip
programme.desc: Phil and Claire plan to vacation and enjoy life once Luke leaves for college, so Phil goes in for a vasectomy. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria disagree about whether or not to find out the sex of the baby. Mitch tries to steer Cam towards getting a job.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Butler's Escape
programme.desc: Luke wants to quit magic but Phil cannot accept it. Gloria's new pregnancy symptoms include snoring and she is keeping the whole house up.

programme.title: Modern Family: Yard Sale

programme.title: Movie: Moana
programme.desc: When a great danger is awakened, a young teenager leaves her peaceful home on a journey to find the demigod Maui. She discovers her sailing skills and Maui agrees to help her become a wayfinder like her ancestors. They face impossible odds together.

programme.title: Bones: The Plain in the Prodigy
programme.desc: When human remains are found alongside the railroad, Brennan and Booth are called to the case. The bones belong to Levi Yoder, a piano prodigy and a member of the Amish community who disappeared roughly two months prior to his Rumspringa.

programme.title: Bones: The Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth investigate human remains found at a neighbourhood block party. Suburban politics and secret scandals give each neighbour in the cul-de-sac a motive, leaving Brennan, Booth and Sweets to sift through the drama to find their suspect.

programme.title: Bones: A Night at the Bones Museum
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth are called to investigate what appears to be charred human remains on an electrical fence. The mysterious corpse is later determined to be a mummified Egyptian royal, but the mystery deepens when a curator is murdered.

programme.title: Movie: Suicide Squad
programme.desc: A government official puts together a team of psychotic and evil supervillains to undertake dangerous suicide missions in return for clemency. Led by Rick Flagg and Deadshot, this 'suicide squad' attempts to save the world and have fun doing it.

programme.title: Movie: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: With the help of District Attorney Harvey Dent and Lieutenant James Gordon, Batman battles a madman known as the Joker who causes terror and mayhem for fun.

programme.title: Arrow: The Magician
programme.desc: A furious Nyssa confronts Oliver about Sara, when Oliver learns Malcolm Merlyn is alive, he suspects Merlyn killed Sara. Oliver and Nyssa join forces to go after the Dark Archer, intent on bringing Sara's killer to justice.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Return of the King
programme.desc: After thousands of classified government files are stolen, the team searches for an underground group of hackers co-founded by Pride's old contact, Elvis Bertrand. Also, Sebastian joins the team as a newly minted NCIS Special Agent.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Agents McGee and Torres travel to New Orleans to partner with Pride and his team in the search for a missing homeland security theoretical terror playbook.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: End of the Line
programme.desc: A gruesome copycat murder on a street car reopens a former case for Wade, evoking painful memories from her past.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Stand
programme.desc: Pride's long-time friend, state and military attorney asks NCIS to investigate the disappearance of a JAG lawyer who specializes in classified cases and volunteers at a private military academy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Swift, Silent, Deadly
programme.desc: A highly credentialed and skilled Special Ops Marine sends Pride and the team on a city-wide manhunt after he assaults six men in a bar.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Slay the Dragon
programme.desc: Tammy is reunited with her ex-husband, who disappeared after embezzling $80 million in Katrina relief funds, after he is linked to the murder of a crime boss' son.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Quid Pro Quo
programme.desc: While investigating a deadly accident at a naval base, the NCIS team finds out a unit of Seabees was poisoned with a contagious supervirus. Also, during an autopsy, Wade is infected with the virus and given hours to live if an antidote can't be found.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek the Third

programme.title: Movie: The BFG
programme.desc: A young girl befriends a giant who she calls the BFG, the Big Friendly Giant. When the other giants attack him in order to eat her, she and the BFG try to convince Queen Victoria that giants exist in order to get her help to get rid of the evil giants.

programme.title: Movie: Batman Begins

programme.title: Movie: Die Hard With a Vengeance

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.desc: The length it took Murr's eyebrows to grow back.

programme.desc: What does Joe do every morning before work? And where was Q employed before becoming a fireman?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Ava

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Swedes

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Yippie Kayak

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Hostage Situation
programme.desc: Charles and Genevieve want to take their relationship to a new level, but his ex-wife, Eleanor, steamrolls their plans. Meanwhile, Amy asks Terry to write a recommendation letter with disastrous results.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: 9 Days
programme.desc: When Captain Holt and Jake accidentally contract the mumps during an investigation, they decide to be quarantined together in hopes of still solving the case. Meanwhile, Rosa tries to help Boyle through a mourning process.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Cruise
programme.desc: Jake and Amy are excited to go on their first real vacation together, but Amy's perfectly planned cruise ship itinerary is thwarted when they discover an old adversary is on board with them.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
programme.desc: The story comes to a close as Katniss and the unit from District 13 prepare to take down President Snow once and for all. With the nation in a full-scale war, Katniss will be tested as never before as she fights for the very future of Panem.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Family, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy heads to places where families rule, including a Hawaiian Thai spot.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Food Done Right
programme.desc: Guy's diggin' into food made the right way, including clam cakes and cheesefries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Oldies but Goodies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some legit local landmarks. In Des Moines, a historic drive-in is famous for its nearly century-old chili recipe. In Leeds Point, N.J., a scenic seaside joint has served up fresh catch since the '30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Intercontinental Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy hits up world flavours tucked away in the U.S.A. In Los Angeles, a Korean-Mexican mashup serves up short rib tacos and spicy pork chimichangas. Also, a New Orleans-inspired joint cooks up Big Easy po' boys and crawfish mac and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' In Cuba
programme.desc: Guy's on an international journey cruising the food scene in Cuba. First, an homage to Cuba's most famous chef, cookin' up his trademark coffee lobster and a regional pork plate.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Havana Hot Spots
programme.desc: Guy hits up the hot spots in Havana, Cuba. A neighborhood joint cooks up house-cured lamb and freshly-caught snapper. A house-turned-restaurant dishes out savory goat stew and Chinese fried rice.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy Chicken and Twisted Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into crazy twists on chicken and burgers! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a bourbon bar that's piling pork onto a patty and doctoring up chicken skins.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rollin' in the Dough
programme.desc: Guy visits Mesa, Arizona for a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialities including a meaty bun, and Tucson for a place serving up saucy sandwiches and spinach dip calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Something Sweet
programme.desc: It's Diners, Drive-Ins, Dives and decadence with plenty of sweet to go along with the savory. First up, Guy Fieri's in Kansas City, Mo., where a brunch spot is serving up a vegan treat rich enough for any meat eater.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy goes to Orlando to visit an authentic Vietnamese spot serving phenomenal pho and a beefy specialty, and to Palm Springs to visit an atypical burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Australian to Asian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and grabbing all kinds of worldwide flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a Japanese-Hawaiian spot putting a quick spin on fish, burgers and burritos. In Kansas City, Mo., an Australian bakery cookin' up Down Under comfort food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island and Desert
programme.desc: Guy finds a desert treasure and island flavour. In Palm Desert, California, he visits a breakfast-lunch cafe dishin' out a righteous rib melt and nostalgic breakfast tarts. Then, in Maui, Hawaii, a funky gluten-free spot makes full-flavoured pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Big Burgers To Little Italy
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from the bomb burgers to a taste of Italy. In Little Rock, Ark., a funky joint pairing their craft brews with all kinds of on-the-bun creations.

programme.title: Tanked!: Kurt Busch's Tank-a-Dega 500
programme.desc: ATM start your engines because NASCAR driver Kurt Busch wants to get tanked. Kurt and his wife are requesting a little piece of paradise inside their aquarium. They want to replicate their wedding location.

programme.title: Tanked!: Wildfire Heroes Tank
programme.desc: Coddingtown Center in Santa Rosa have tasked the guys with a very special tank. To kick off their new remodel, they want Wayde and Brett to make a tank that pays respects to the heroes that helped the area during the recent wildfires.

programme.desc: Lifestyle brand Salt Life needs Wayde and Brett's help again. This time they want an aquarium even BIGGER and BETTER than the original. Closer to home, the guys get asked to build a custom acrylic waterfall as part of a memorial in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Tanked!: All in the Ocean
programme.desc: Atlantic City is in for a 'fish lift.' Ocean Casino Resort wants to bring the ocean into 'Ocean.' The 6,000-gallon aquarium has ATM team literally burning through panels to get this job done.

programme.title: Tanked!: Mel's Drive In Tank
programme.desc: California restaurant Mel's Drive In wants a tank for their new location in Santa Monica. The owners want a nostalgic feel and a ton of insert pieces that represent Mel's storied history, while pointing to the restaurant's future.

programme.title: Tanked!: This Tank Is Ludacris!
programme.desc: Rapper and actor Ludacris is ready to get Tanked! He wants Brett and Wayde to build him a classy and sophisticated aquarium with lots of exotic fish! It's a race against the clock to get Ludacris his new aquarium.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World

programme.title: The Simpsons: Daddicus Finch
programme.desc: Lisa and Homer's bond gets stronger when they start spending real quality time together, and Bart feels neglected. So Marge tries to help Homer balance his attention between the kids.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Girl on the Bus
programme.desc: When Lisa spots a new best friend from the window of the bus, she gets a taste of what life could be like with a different, more cultured family, and proceeds to try and live a double life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Clown Stays in the Picture

programme.title: The Simpsons: 101 Mitigations

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Want You (She's So Heavy)

programme.title: The Simpsons: E My Sports

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girl's in the Band

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Just a Girl Who Can't Say D'oh

programme.title: The Simpsons: Woo-Hoo Dunnit

programme.title: The Simpsons: Crystal Blue-Haired Persuasion

programme.desc: The gang gets to work early so they can spend some quality time together.

programme.desc: An intruder finds his way into a home and takes hostages in the basement.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death After Midnight
programme.desc: A married mother of three was found with a single gunshot wound to her head. Unknown was how she was shot, if it was suicide or murder. The coroner ruled it a suicide but a call from a source re-opened the case with the husband arrested.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sophia's Secret
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox's relationship with her high-school boyfriend Adam Shigwadja had become so abusive that he had been arrested once for threatening her with a knife. But nothing the court could do to separate them worked...until all hell broke loose.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Reunion
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates a whirlwind romance and the accusation that Lamont Stephenson strangled his fiancé and her dog. Later, Callahan Walsh explores police claims that Gloria Schulze is a freeloading drunk driver who repeatedly cheats the legal system.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Stolen Life
programme.desc: John Walsh explores the case of youthful con man Edgardo Perez, who allegedly preyed on older men until it turned deadly. Then, Callahan Walsh travels to Boulder to talk to a child predator.

programme.title: Diabolical: Recording Evil
programme.desc: Gina Coccia comes home from work to discover the bodies of her girlfriend Lynn, and Lynn's nephew, Ronnie, shot and stabbed on the kitchen floor. The investigation that follows will lead police, to a months long plot and a terrifying act of betrayal.

programme.title: Diabolical: Weeping Widow
programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Kill List
programme.desc: Prison Valley is rocked by the murder of Prisons Chief Tom Clements. The cops think it's part of a wider plot, and they're running out of time to catch the killer.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father
programme.desc: When Jim Durgan's body is found in Prison Valley, no one knows why. His estranged wife is drawing a blank and his out-of-state girlfriend can't explain it. What follows is a murky investigation that unravels a sinister and cleverly staged murder plot.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Killer Confession
programme.desc: When Lea Porter goes missing in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery - the killer's true identity. As the killer evades arrest, Lea's brother devises a plan to make him confess.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: On March 21st 2011, a fire burned down a parsonage behind a church and a Pastor loses his wife. Once the fire had settled a fire marshal investigated the site and discovered that there was more to the story than an accidental fire.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Warning Signs
programme.desc: A Deputy reports a 1990 Dodge Intrepid pushed over an embankment just south of Gig Harbor, Washington. He investigates and discovers the dead body of missing Puyallup father, Randall Ferguson, in the trunk. He had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Letters in the Closet
programme.desc: Karla leaves her home one night and never returns. The next day, her husband calls the police to file a missing person report. When the police uncover a treasure trove of hidden secrets, they have to decide who is telling the truth and who is lying.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Devil You Know
programme.desc: 20-year-old Missy Grubaugh, a devout Christian, is saving herself for marriage. But Missy's innocent charms attract the wrong type of men… with deadly results.

programme.title: Betrayed: Four Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: After four marriages, 36-year-old Carol Grannon admits she's struggled to find someone to take care of her. That's why she returned to school and landed a lucrative job. Sadly, though, one of her men will end her life just as this new chapter begins.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Ride the Rails
programme.desc: A neighbour calls 911 when she smells smoke coming from an apartment shared by Ricky Sleight and William Baldi. The police find Baldi's dead body, but Sleight escapes by riding freight trains across the country. The FBI turns to the media for help.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Wear a Pink Shirt
programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Silence a Witness
programme.desc: An Oklahoma drug lord killed a man for revenge, and fled to Mexico to escape prosecution.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Copy Movies
programme.desc: A successful video pirate scams the film industry while partying with celebrities and hiding from the law.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Burn a Truck
programme.desc: Jermaine LeBron and his friends murdered a man in Florida and stole his expensive truck.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Silence a Witness
programme.desc: An Oklahoma drug lord killed a man for revenge, and fled to Mexico to escape prosecution.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Copy Movies

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Conquering the Sky
programme.desc: This episode exposes the myths about the Wright brothers' invention of the airplane and America's favorite missing person, Amelia Earhart.

programme.title: Wingshooting USA: Phun for Everyone
programme.desc: Gratitude is something we often overlook, but Dave Olsen at South Dakota's Pheasant Phun lodge gives us reason to reflect on what's really important in life. Enjoying the places, people, and incredible country we hunt in are high on Dave's list.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Unravel the seamy secrets of Las Vegas. Where Mobsters once ruled. Where casinos suck you in to keep you playing and losing. See why this was a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for atomic bombs and a meeting place for 9/11's terrorists.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Ancient Astronauts
programme.desc: The idea of ancient astronauts goes back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenged religion and science. Find out who his enemies were, what his influences were, and why he was jailed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Experimental Soldiers
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, the United States of America searches for a way to create a generation of 'Supersoldiers' who use telepathy to win battles. In the 1950s gangster Whitey Bulger volunteers for the CIA's LSD project known as MK-Ultra.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Classic Home vs. Eclectic Suite
programme.desc: Gary and Jerry win a large house at auction but must split the house in half in order to take it on the road. As they renovate the larger house, they enlist Gary's girls to help renovate the smaller piece as a mother-in-law suite.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Divided Domicile
programme.desc: After cutting their house in half for the move, the Snow Sisters get creative putting the house back together and decide to add on in the middle of the two structures. They turn the home into the perfect country getaway for a family.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Randy's Shotgun Shanty Vs. Hayhurst Brothers' Garden District Digs
programme.desc: The Hayhurst brothers win a house at auction, but after the move, unseen rot under the house leaves them with only half of it.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Tuscan Abode
programme.desc: Casey & Catrina get a good buy on a 2 bed 1 bath home in Denton, TX. Casey is anticipating an easy move and Catrina wants to build an addition to get more bedroom and bathroom space. Together they decide to draw on the house's original character.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Refreshing Modern Residence
programme.desc: Raf and Paige remodel a tiny two-bedroom house won at auction. Raf finds stainless steel cabinets in the kitchen and plans to repurpose them to be used in another part of the house.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Cozy Cottage vs. Gary's Girls' Architectural Abode
programme.desc: HD Snow calls on his family to renovate a couple of storage houses he has on his moving yard. Donna and Toni take one house while Gary's girls take the other as the friendly family competition begins. Both teams plan to reuse some of the homes' contents.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Americana Style Design
programme.desc: Paige and Raf renovate an old army barracks they won at an auction in Aledo, Texas. Military accents help to keep the original Americana spirit of the barracks as it is being transformed into a stylish and functional home.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Rustic English Re-tree-t
programme.desc: Pete and his team embark on a quest to an idyllic farm in Waxhaw, NC with orders to craft an elegant English retreat with a hanging bed fit for a queen. But one thing might stand in the way of Pete and his holy grail of pastoral treehouse builds, goats!

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Treehouses IV
programme.desc: Join Pete Nelson on a journey to explore ingenious treehouse designs and engineering feats of builders the world over. At the end of his adventure, Pete embarks on his very own epic treehouse engineering repair.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Texas-Sized Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew saddle up and ride on down to Leakey, TX, to build a colossal, Texas-sized treehouse. He rounds-up 'the magnificent seven' of cypresses alongside the banks of the Frio River and builds a treehouse with the longest bridge in NT&S history.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nelson Family Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete gifts his daughter Emily, and Patrick, her boyfriend and an NTS carpenter, with the ultimate housewarming gift - a treehouse of their very own - by turning a piece of Nelson family history into a Moroccan marvel nested nearly 35 feet off the ground.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950 ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heather and immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Shower Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a behemoth 1927 Tudor house, but while she admires the home's original details, her dad discovers a problem. She uses a kitchenette to create a bar, revamps an uneven patio and enlarges the master bathroom.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes 'r' Us
programme.desc: Four imaginative bakers are going to have to unleash their inner child as they compete for the chance to serve their creations at a black tie awards gala for the Chicago Toy and Game Fair.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Celebrity: Medieval Cupcakes
programme.desc: Four celebrity bakers are about to get medieval, as Yvette Nicole Brown, Brooke Burke-Charvet, Carson Kressley and Vanessa Marano battle to prove that their cupcakes reign supreme.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Celebrity: Matilda
programme.desc: Drake Bell, Lori Greiner, Bob Harper and Heather Morris battle to prove their celebrity cupcake dominance and create show-stopping cupcakes for a party celebrating the wonder and whimsy of Roald Dahl's classic story, Matilda.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Sweet Screams
programme.desc: The five remaining bakers take the cream puff to the dark side by creating 'scream puffs' and scary mask desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: The Candyman Cometh
programme.desc: The four remaining bakers make desserts to taste like their favorite candy bars and face death by chocolate with a dessert that combines chocolate with odd ingredients.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Extreme Halloween
programme.desc: The three remaining bakers create an edible centerpiece that glows, three creepy treats and a final challenge of Jack-O-Lantern cakes that light up. The winning baker takes home the title of 'Halloween Baking Champion' and $25,000.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Big Ben and Wearable Hat Cakes
programme.desc: London comes to Las Vegas in a wedding shower creation that's ready for high tea, then cake and ice cream get a whole new meaning. Plus, a spinning masterpiece shines like crystals but is completely edible.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Luxurious and Playful Cakes
programme.desc: Luxurious details and elegant decor make for a most-extravagant wedding cake. Then zoo animals come to life, sugar looks like hand-blown glass, and a duck rides a mechanical bull on a super playful birthday cake.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Local Legends
programme.desc: Alfonso takes you on a tour of local legends, from Tennessee's iconic Jack Daniel's Whiskey to the Fannie May factory in Ohio where sweet Buckeyes are made. He also finds out how a novel mix of hard candy and gum became the Charms Blow Pop.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Family Recipes
programme.desc: Some secret family recipes are just meant to be shared, like the secret behind Graeter's rich and creamy ice cream. Get the lowdown on how Mrs. T's Pierogies turned a classic Polish dish into the American dream.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sugar and Spice
programme.desc: It's sugar and spice and everything nice as host Alfonso Ribeiro shows how Sriracha hot sauce and Tina's Chimichangas amp up the spice factor in their tasty treats.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Candy Critters
programme.desc: Gophers and bunnies and butterflies oh my! Even a vegetarian will want to snack on these creatures. Catch cheerful Albanese gummy butterflies in action and pop in on Savannah Candy Kitchen's chocolate gophers.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Love is in the Air
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro gets the lowdown on the sweet messages imprinted on Necco's classic Sweet Hearts and how the Perfect Bite packs so much flavor into their Caramelized Onion and Feta Pastry Kisses.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Little Bits
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores little treats with big flavor like the colorful Carousel gumballs at Ford Gum, Ghirardelli Chocolate's decadent semi-sweet Baking Chips and the tasty Duchess Gem Donuts from Carolina Foods.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Smoked
programme.desc: Roger Mooking criss-crosses America to count down 15 of the very best steaks, wings, Reubens and more- all made even better with glorious smoke. From salt-cured country ham to smoked fish chowder, bacon bourbon rib-eye steak to smoky s'mores pancakes.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Sandwiches, Street Food and Cobbler a la Mode
programme.desc: Brad Miller heads to Portland, Ore., to visit Chef Melissa McMillan at her Pastrami Zombie food truck. She shows Brad how to make the truck's namesake sandwich, and he also tries the Cubby Cubano, a twist on the classic Cubano sandwich.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Biscuit Sandwiches, Smoked Wings and Sweet Hand Pies
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Atlanta, Georgia, where he finds the Deep South Biscuit Co. truck delivering fried chicken biscuit with bourbon-bacon jam and a brisket biscuit sandwich with cherry cola barbecue sauce.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Michael McKean makes everyone's birthday wishes come true as he celebrates the best holiday of the year. He discovers that birthday cake was born during a revolution and that a bowl of Chinese noodles can bring you more birthdays to celebrate.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Game Night
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes into the wild to hunt for juicy game meat myths and fresh fish fibs. He calls foul on duck a l'orange with its so-called French origins and throws a line at wicked tuna to find out how we got hooked on tuna melts.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Wicked Good
programme.desc: Michael McKean celebrates Halloween by investigating dishes that are so good they're downright wicked! He's uncovering rhubarb pie's paranormal proclivities and does a background check on ramen with its racy rap sheet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Baked Goodies
programme.desc: Michael McKean throws the carb-free diet out the window and uncovers the stories behind our favorite baked goodies. He starts by revealing that cupcakes are edible equations and explaining how the whoopie pie nearly caused a civil war.

programme.title: Good Eats: There Will Be Oil
programme.desc: Alton looks at edible oils that offer a wide range of flavours.

programme.title: The American Game
programme.desc: College football has evolved in so many transformative ways. All throughout its history, the sport's constant evolutions have had common threads, with officials and coaches striving to make it safer, more exciting and more entertaining.

programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Hear from those who knew him and the investigators who spent a lifetime tracking him down.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: A confrontation on the Browns property shuts down production and forces them to make a big decision.

programme.title: Shark Week's 50 Best Bites

programme.desc: Tournament bass fishing coverage from across the country.

programme.desc: With prankster Luan away at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they should be safe. The kids discover Dad isn't at his old job anymore and worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: The Loud House: Overnight Success/ Ties that Bind
programme.desc: Lincoln invites Clyde to a sleepover, but gets jealous when Clyde wants to hang out with his sisters. After eavesdropping on his parents, Lincoln thinks they have decided to get rid of their kids.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Worldwide Weather Wipeouts
programme.desc: Lakes are boiled and frogs frozen alive. Plagues of locusts rain down and snow buries a city. Explore global weather wipeouts from Maryland to the Middle East.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Fireballs from Space
programme.desc: Meteor shock, armies of snow monsters, blood red falls and tumbleweed invasions are all captured on video, examined and explained.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Ice Tsunami
programme.desc: A creeping blob of ice targets a resort town, popcorn snow falls in Kansas and mysterious, ghostly clouds are linked to space dust.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Bear County Crash
programme.desc: Veteran pilot Dave Akers and his friend, Gary Nall, enjoy a leisurely afternoon flying over the Knik Glacier in Southern Alaska. But as they head back to the airfield, they are pulled into a downdraft and crash land in remote wilderness.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Come Rain or Cyclone
programme.desc: Water is a necessity of life but in certain forms, it can threaten it. From surviving a monster typhoon in India, completing a record-breaking free dive to a horrifying plunge into a sinkhole, we are always at the mercy of water.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Tunnel Creek Avalanche
programme.desc: A group of 16 elite skiers and snowboarders on a back-country adventure in Washington state hear a 25-foot-high wall of snow thundering toward them.

programme.title: Water: The Ultimate Force
programme.desc: It's the most powerful and insidious force on the planet. How can something so vital be so dangerous? From hurricane storm surges to raging floods, we illustrate the science behind the power of water. Hear incredible stories of survival and flood safety.

programme.title: Top Ten Extreme Adventures
programme.desc: Adventurers willingly take on the harsh conditions of Mother Nature. From trekking through freezing tempters to biking through a desert, here are the top ten weather challenges.

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Destinations
programme.desc: From extreme heat, to bone chilling cold, every year millions of us set out on a weather watching adventure. If you love weather like we do, these are the top ten must-see destinations for your travel bucket list.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Quakes and Mountain Lions
programme.desc: Do you know how to survive a bone-jarring earthquake or escape a deadly ocean whirlpool? Intense, caught-on-camera video pits you against deadly power outages and hungry mountain lions!

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Earthquakes and Blizzards
programme.desc: Video footage of deadly lightning, wicked winds and high-tides are featured. Also, what to do when forced to give birth in a blinding blizzard and how to survive a seismic shocker from 55 stories in the air.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Rip Currents and Lightning
programme.desc: What would you do if a volcano erupts in front of you? How would you survive a deadly rip current? Harrowing caught-on-camera video pits you against broken water mains, deadly lightning, dangerous hot air balloon crashes, and giant tsunamis!

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Snake Bites and Quicksand
programme.desc: Examining the possibilities of surviving an encounter with quicksand, as well as what to do if bitten by a rattlesnake. Also featuring footage of giant hurricanes, capsized boats and much more.

programme.title: AMHQ Weekend
programme.desc: The science and stories of weather, plus in-depth forecasts with a focus on weekend weather.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: The latest news and weather to prepare for the weekend.

programme.title: Storms in 3D
programme.desc: Hurricanes and tornadoes - the most powerful storms on the planet. Now, we're creating and dissecting them right in our studios with augmented reality. Thanks to computer-generated technology, we're taking you right into the heart of these storms.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Swamped in the Amazon
programme.desc: Yossi Ghinsberg and his friend Kevin Gale are deep in the Bolivian Amazon when they encounter extremely dangerous rapids and an unforeseen waterfall.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Delirious in the Desert
programme.desc: Just a few hours into bouldering in Joshua Tree Park, Paul Hanks slips and falls about 20 feet, shattering his left heel and fracturing his pelvis. Disoriented and unable to walk, he falls a second time and fractures his skull.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Buried by a Blizzard
programme.desc: A long distance commute for Paula Lane and her boyfriend Rod Clifton takes a deadly turn when their Jeep gets stuck on a closed mountain road.

programme.title: Hoarders: Tra/ Jill
programme.desc: Tra, a 40-year-old firefighter, lives in chaos, surrounded by wall-to-wall hoarded possessions. Jill and her children live in a house filled with dusty boxes and black mould in the basement.

programme.title: Hoarders: Michelle/ Kim
programme.desc: Michelle's house is filled with 60 birds and mountains of clutter. Her husband won't return until the mess is cleaned up. Kim is a sales rep who can't keep organized or find anything amongst her clutter.

programme.title: Hoarders: Tami/ George
programme.desc: Tami is battling cancer but her extreme hoarding is getting in the way of her recuperation. George's hoarding has strained his relationships with his wife, daughters, and siblings.

programme.title: Hoarders: Adella/ Teri
programme.desc: Adella's children try one last time to help their mother fight her hoarding. Teri's hoarding caused her doctor to call Child Protective Services to help her children.

programme.title: Psychic Kids: Make the Spirits Stay
programme.desc: A12-year-old girl from Taveres, Florida finds comfort from the dark spirits that she inadvertently invited into her life. A girl's science-based parents are desperate to make sense of the spirits that are stalking their daughter.

programme.title: Psychic Kids: Ghost Sick
programme.desc: Psychic Alex Curcio must help an 11-year-old California girl find the courage to speak up against the spirits that are running around her home. Meanwhile, in northern Utah, Nick Barger meets a sick 13-year-old boy.

programme.title: Psychic Kids: Living with Evil
programme.desc: Mentor Peri Zarrella visits a 13-year-old girl in Columbus, Ohio who has a disturbing entity living in her home and haunting the entire family. Peri believes this evil spirit is not only attached to the girl, but dangers to others, including herself.

programme.title: Movie: Patriots Day
programme.desc: The newly promoted Police Sergeant works the day of the Boston Marathon. He joins a dedicated group of people, from investigators to nurses, who race against time to catch the bombers and heal the city. He sees hope as the whole city comes together.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Movie: The Game Plan
programme.desc: A quarterback's perfect bachelor lifestyle is put on hold when he discovers he has an 8-year-old daughter. The two form a bond over ballet and she eventually helps him clean up his image and discover his thoughtful and loving paternal instincts.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: The Anti-protest Protest
programme.desc: The always funny Chaunte Wayans is back to reminisce about an old love, and Dave Helem has a run-in with the anti-gluten brigade. Plus, Pretty Ricki's daughter is spilling tea on the entire congregation.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pizza Panties
programme.desc: Vanessa Gonzalez gets hot and heavy over pizza, Rita Brent meets a six-year-old with more than just an old soul, and Gina Yashere comes face to face with a Jamaican pick-up artist. Plus, Orlando Leyba exposes a big scam at the gym.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Losing My Religion
programme.desc: Correy Bell makes tumbling down the stairs look sexy, and Dave Helem has a message for substitute teachers. Plus, Pretty Ricki puts the 'C'' in crazy' and Dave Temple has a church experience he'll never forget.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stage Five Clinger
programme.desc: Comedian Rita Brent reveals her number one tip for going number two at work, Kyle Erby thinks black folks should stick together, sometimes, and Vanessa Fraction gets an early sex-ed lesson. Plus, Owen Smith moves to LA to ditch a clinger.

programme.title: Fameless: Through the Cooking Glass
programme.desc: An aspiring art expert gets 'framed,' a product tester learns a lesson in the kitchen, and a wannabe relationship expert loses a babe in the woods.

programme.title: Fameless: Holiday Special
programme.desc: A wannabe game show host and his contestant have an unfortunate run in with Santa Claus. A helpful elf tries to find out if a hospital should be on the naughty or nice list. An aspiring host crashes a holiday event.

programme.title: Fameless: Ear Factor
programme.desc: A wannabe host pitches a product that sounds way too good to be true, an aspiring crime fighter runs out of gas during a sting operation, and a drill sergeant bombs his one chance at stardom.

programme.title: Fameless: Host Buster
programme.desc: A wannabe TV star finds a crack in a new dental product, an aspiring host takes a swing at stardom, and a would-be hotel critic doesn't have a ghost of a chance.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Inventions 8
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Inventions 11
programme.desc: Twenty more inventions including a way to make pooping in the woods even more exciting, a way to cool your man parts for optimal baby making, and a sound system for the great beyond.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Smartest Inventions 12
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the smartest inventions ever to hit the market. There's a flask for your butt, a way to re-shape meat, and the last doughnut security system you'll ever need.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 13
programme.desc: These inventions could put Thomas Edison to shame, from a bird feeder with a shocking high-voltage surprise, to a bowl made entirely of bacon and a wacky way to grow bananas at home.

programme.title: Movie: The Game Plan
programme.desc: A quarterback's perfect bachelor lifestyle is put on hold when he discovers he has an 8-year-old daughter. The two form a bond over ballet and she eventually helps him clean up his image and discover his thoughtful and loving paternal instincts.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Bro, They're Surrounding Us
programme.desc: Michael reveals an amazing credit card hack, demonstrates how far stem cell research has come, and spooks a gnome-fearing gardener.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: It's a Chicken, Sir
programme.desc: Michael discovers a ferocious new breed of animal at a park, invades a local tea shop, and transforms himself at an abandoned art studio.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Impractically Carbonaro Jokers Effect
programme.desc: Four very impractical assistants invade a coffee bar to help Michael stun customers, but they quickly discover the joke is on them.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Industrial Asphalt Sealant
programme.desc: Michael trains his coworkers how to hold a dog who can't hold it. A man can vanish into a manhole, and maybe even a manhole can vanish itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pineapple Breeze
programme.desc: Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix a tablet, makes a drink that's impossible to swallow and turns a dog into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Essence of the Wings

programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego - California Tales: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Cooking for 7,000

programme.desc: Southern white rhino Victoria is pregnant with a calf that could be a key in saving a species from extinction. Connor the Malayan tiger has tooth trouble. A new bird keeper learns to feed the shoebill. Polar bears use their hunting skills on live prey.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Llama Drama
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne is tasked at removing a six-pound mass from a small dog, Dr. Blue and wife welcome their first daughter to the family. The vets make a house call to a llama that's causing some drama. Dr. Ross extracts a whopping 14 teeth from a mini poodle.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Sneak Peek

programme.desc: Dr. Blue has a crisis on his hands with a dog that has chewed off her own tail, while Dr. Ross treats a reptile that might need a tail amputation. Dr. Lavigne helps Sutter Butter, a cat rescued from being thrown out of a car, and is now having seizures.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trespassers Beware
programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: The Face of Danger
programme.desc: The game warden's marine team searches a foreign cargo vessel in the Gulf of Mexico. A man is suspected of poaching 15 deer out of season and the game wardens discover a large marijuana growing operation outside of Dallas.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Red Flag
programme.desc: A landowner is spoken to for a second time about illegally hunting dove over bait. An injured deer is found hiding in a shed after being attacked. While pulling over a suspicious vehicle, the game wardens notice the driver hiding something under his seat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stray Bullets
programme.desc: In El Paso County, teal season has just begun. An injured hog needs help in Hardin County. Galveston County fishermen are not playing by the rules. A suspicious driver is searched in Chambers County. Turtle hatchlings are released on South Padre Island.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back in the Wild
programme.desc: Anglers are out all over Texas. In Houston County, a Game Warden returns after a life-threatening injury. Along the coast, fishermen get caught with too many sharks. A protected turtle gets relocated and anglers on the Gulf learn how to tag fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks and Bows
programme.desc: A hunter is confronted for killing a deer with a gun in bowhunting only season. A man is questioned for being in possession of venomous copperhead snakes. While checking bowhunters at night, a game warden helps find an injured hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Owl Gone Bad
programme.desc: It's the opening of deer and oyster season in Texas. On the Gulf, Game Wardens find illegal undersized oysters. In East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps. An owl is rescued from a chicken coop and set free.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wildcat Garage
programme.desc: Deer season is well underway across Texas. In East Texas, Game Wardens find a bobcat a new home and investigate an illegally killed deer. On the coast, the Texas Game Wardens deal with an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Panhandle Poachers
programme.desc: Warden Marshall leads the charge on a poaching investigation. Warden Richards visits an allegedly illegal snake breeder. Wardens Gould and Hickerson try to save an injured pelican, while Warden Miller brings a caracara bird to rehab.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: With oyster season in full swing, Texas game wardens ensure everyone is following the rules on land and water. Hunters are investigated for trespassing on private property. The game wardens find an oyster boat deckhand with several warrants.

programme.desc: A successful couple has everything they could want, but one of them is consumed by a lust that will destroy their marriage, and end one of their lives. Later, a stripper with a tragic past marries a kind man, but when greed takes hold, it leads to blood.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: What's Mine Is Mine
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Central Florida, a jilted wife, hell-bent on revenge, commits a grisly crime, but later pays the price. And later, a toxic mix of lust, greed and pride turns the promising start of a new marriage into a living hell.

programme.title: Dateline: Without a Trace
programme.desc: When 29-year-old Carrie Olson doesn’t show up for work and is reported missing, an entire community pulls together in the search. Detectives suspect foul play and soon focus their investigation on two men in her life.

programme.title: Dateline: The Wire
programme.desc: A young nurse was murdered in her small studio apartment with only a broken necklace and an unusual weapon found as evidence. Twenty years after the case went cold, a determined detective attempts to crack it.

programme.title: Dateline: The Wire
programme.desc: A young nurse was murdered in her small studio apartment with only a broken necklace and an unusual weapon found as evidence. Twenty years after the case went cold, a determined detective attempts to crack it.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic?: Part 1: Missing
programme.desc: In October 1989, 10 year-old-Amy Mihaljevic is lured to a suburban Ohio shopping mall by an unknown man and is never seen again. A 30 year mystery and nationwide manhunt ensues, thousands of leads, hundreds of suspects, one killer still at large.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic?: Part 2: The Hunt
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains at large. A cavalcade of suspects emerges, each more compelling than the last. Investigators explore each one. Then, 106 days after Amy was taken, a gruesome discovery some 50 miles away from her Bay Village home: a body.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic?: Part 3: New Evidence
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains on the loose and the case goes nationwide. Margaret appears on Oprah, anniversaries come and go, and then, finally, a confession. A man stands up in church in a neighboring town and declares: 'I killed Amy Mihaljevic.'

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Set Me Free
programme.desc: When Detectives looking for missing Mom, Tami Reay find blood in her car they arrest her husband, Brad. But then they receive a tip off, pointing the finger at an entirely new suspect.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Confession
programme.desc: Melissa Atkin is found bound and murdered in her home in Smyrna, Tennessee. Eventually, the investigation focuses in on two individuals, with a series of recorded phone calls proving vital in exonerating one of them, whilst incriminating the other.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dead Man Talking
programme.desc: Dedicated father of two, John Riebe, is found dead on the floor of his home in Toledo, Ohio. The investigation quickly turns on those closest to John, and a series of phone calls and voicemails prove key in uncovering a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Close friends are investigated after the death of an 83-year-old grandfather who was having an affair with a woman half his age.

programme.title: American Monster: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Family and faith have always been important to Richard Beasley, as these home videos show. Which is why it's so scary when one day - the Ohio man vanishes. Especially after police discover that an online monster has been luring local men to their deaths.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Killing Machine
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Meyer Lansky
programme.desc: Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, let alone find his riches.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Lonely Star State Flip
programme.desc: A young couple finds themselves in deep water on a flip in Pecan Grove, Texas. While he works on an oil rig for two weeks at a time, she struggles to find projects she can take on alone while she cares for their baby. The stress of their open house is on!

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Shirley Is Serious
programme.desc: Sisters Shirley and Rose are flipping their first house in a Boston suburb. Rose takes the lead naturally, but Shirley grows increasingly worried as certain projects seem to spiral out of control.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Mother's Mayhem
programme.desc: A mom and son flip their first house in Nolensville, TN, but her recklessness and his overly cautious approach immediately put them at odds.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flipped Out Friends
programme.desc: Two real estate agent best friends flip their first home in Tacoma, WA, with hopes that their insider knowledge of what sells will pull them through. However, with no prior renovation experience, they put their friendship, flip and safety on the line.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flip-Cation
programme.desc: A West Coast couple attempts a four-week flip while on vacation. As the end of the trip approaches, he wants to find contractors to finish the house when they're back home. She worries that they won't find anyone who can see her vision through to the end.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Slow and Unsteady
programme.desc: A quick two-month flip is delayed fivefold when unforeseen structural issues are discovered during demo. Under the gun, the couple's priorities split when she decides to focus on intricate salvage projects while he's left with some major undertakings.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Momma Knows Best
programme.desc: A college student enlists the help of her mother while flipping a house in Connecticut for money to pay for her tuition. The mother is worried her daughter's social life will distract her from pulling her weight in the project.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: On a Limb
programme.desc: A woman in Milford, CT, begins to worry when her husband's haphazard renovation methods take their flip off the rails. She's worried about the quality of the job and knows taking back control of the construction is the only way to carry them through.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin For The Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True

programme.desc: Mark clients want bigger and bigger antique log homes, but pioneers didn't build big log cabins. They did build big barns though, so the guys try and build a 1200 sq. foot cabin using barn beams from their inventory.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy in the Sky

programme.desc: Hugo, the loathsome health inspector who torments Bob, quits his job to become a nudist after discovering the town's new nude beach.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Broadcast Wagstaff School News
programme.desc: There is a 'Mad Pooper' running wild at the Belcher children's middle school and Tina finds herself on a mission to get to the 'bottom' of the situation.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour Weekend: The U.S.-China Trade War

programme.title: Firing Line With Margaret Hoover

programme.title: Great Lakes Now
programme.desc: Discussions from scientist to government official, highlight from certain key topic from conferences during Great Lakes Week in Cleveland, OH are presented.

programme.title: Cycle of Health

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Bread

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: The Durrells in Corfu
programme.desc: Louisa opens a new boarding house, but the arrival of a mysterious guest places it under police scrutiny. Gerry announces plans to open his own zoo. Margo struggles to find clients for her beauty treatments.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Poldark
programme.desc: The Poldarks look forward to life together in peace, but a plea from Ned Depard compels Ross to return to the capital. Back in Cornwall, Demelza encounters a new opponent. George struggles to engage with the world after Elizabeth’s death.

programme.title: Poldark Revealed
programme.desc: Follow the cast and crew of Poldark on location in beautiful Cornwall. See how the writer, directors and actors are working to re-create the magic of the original TV series.

programme.title: Line of Separation
programme.desc: After the fall of the Third Reich, the small town of Tannbach is cruelly divided down the middle in the battle between East and West regimes and the town's inhabitants suffer the consequences.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: The Durrells in Corfu
programme.desc: Louisa opens a new boarding house, but the arrival of a mysterious guest places it under police scrutiny. Gerry announces plans to open his own zoo. Margo struggles to find clients for her beauty treatments.
